title: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada
display_title: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada
wikitext:
[]: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 10, 2018 11:04 pm Has Utada's official translation (from her website) of Sakura Nagashi been posted here before? I can't quite remember but I think her POV of the lyrics are pretty insightful (especially considering that she wrote the lyrics without knowing much about 3.0's plot!) http://www.animelyrics.com/jpop/utada/sakuranagashi.htm She inquired tonight on Twitter if she should translate some of her songs, I thought it was a very interesting question to pose: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Looking at the song lyrics now, I hope that that hope will eventually be Shinji's mindset in Shin Eva...Time will tell, of course.

[]: Re: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jul 12, 2018 10:54 am Hadn't seen them. Thanks! :)

[]: Re: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 27, 2018 10:16 am Glad you enjoyed the read
summary: []: Sakura Nagashi Official translation by Hikaru Utada             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 10, 2018 11:04 pm Has Utada's official translation (from her website) of Sakura Nagashi been posted here before?
